evals.prompt: I dropped a bunch of new source files in Inbox/ — can you catch the wiki up? Process everything that's pending.
evals.expected_output: Health-checks the vault, scans Inbox/ + .raw/ for pending/unregistered sources, ingests each in priority order, archives each source to .raw/<type>/, regenerates index.md, and commits per source with no permission prompts. Final summary lists sources ingested, files archived, and any blocked items.
Same autonomous startup->ingest pass. Surfaces the pending count up front, then processes the queue, commits per source, leaves Inbox/ clear of ingested sources, and reports hot.md updated/unchanged.

evals.prompt: Ingest the HCS-Surety source files in my Inbox and commit them.
evals.expected_output: Ingests the HCS-Surety-related sources (HCS-Surety.md, layout, manifest, owners-manual, DM-guide), decomposes into the right wiki pages, archives each to .raw/, regenerates index, commits each source. Does not ask before committing.
